title: Raichur Fort
tagline: Raichur Fort — heritage city of Karnataka

overview.short: Raichur Fort is a fortress located on a hilltop in the heart of the Raichur in North Karnataka.
overview.description: Raichur Fort is a fortress located on a hilltop in the heart of the Raichur in North Karnataka. The Raichur region (Raichur Doab) has been ruled by several families; the Kakatiya dynasty, Rashtrakutas, Vijayanagar Empire, Bahmanis and Nizams.

topPlaces.name: Malliabad
topPlaces.description: Malliabad is 5 km from Raichur. It has a fort and monuments.

topPlaces.name: Raichur
topPlaces.description: Raichur, also pronounced as Rāyachūru (formerly Raichore), is a city and headquarters of eponymous Raichur district in the Karnataka state of India. It is located between Krishna and Tungabhadra rivers.

topPlaces.name: Ek Minar Mosque, Raichur
topPlaces.description: The Ek Minar Mosque, also known as Ek Minar Masjid (lit. 'One-minaret Mosque') and Ek Minar Ki Masjid (lit. 'Mosque of One Minaret'), is a mosque located in Raichur, in the state of Karnataka, India. The mosque is a state protected monument.

items.note: Malliabad is 5 km from Raichur. It has a fort and monuments.

Raichur, also pronounced as Rāyachūru (formerly Raichore), is a city and headquarters of eponymous Raichur district in the Karnataka state of India. It is located between Krishna and Tungabhadra rivers.

The Ek Minar Mosque, also known as Ek Minar Masjid (lit. 'One-minaret Mosque') and Ek Minar Ki Masjid (lit. 'Mosque of One Minaret'), is a mosque located in Raichur, in the state of Karnataka, India. The mosque is a state protected monument.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Raichur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Raichur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Raichur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (92 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (179 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Raichur Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Raichur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Raichur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Raichur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Raichur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Malliabad, Raichur, Ek Minar Mosque, Raichur.
